hook.summary: Fast-paced rhythm gameplay with 'PERFECT' feedback and upbeat music.
hook.visual_action: Black tiles scroll down a gradient background and are tapped in sync with the music.
hook.voiceover_transcript: You're all I can think of, every breath I drink up

scene_flow: Introduction of rhythm gameplay with single black tiles and score tracking.
Introduction of long-press blue tiles requiring sustained contact.
Increased difficulty with faster tile sequences and continuous 'PERFECT' feedback.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy music-based rhythm games and satisfying gameplay loops.
